[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000100101 3
1 0111101111 8
2 0110110010 5
3 0101001001 4
4 0111110010 6
5 0011101111 7
6 0011111101 7
7 0000100101 3

01 10 0101000000 2
12 21 0101000000 2
23 32 0011100010 4
34 43 0011101101 6
45 54 0000100101 3 match 0 7
56 65 0000100101 3 match 0 7
67 76 0011000110 4
70 07 0001000100 2

02 20 0101110000 4
13 31 0001001001 3
24 42 0011110000 4
35 53 0000100101 3 match 0 7
46 64 0011101101 6
57 75 0000000100 1
60 06 0101100100 4
71 17 0001000000 1

03 30 0001100100 3
14 41 0001001001 3
25 52 0000100000 1
36 63 0011101111 7 match 5
47 74 0011000100 3
50 05 0000100100 2
61 16 0101001001 4 match 3
72 27 0011000010 3

04 40 0001110100 4
15 51 0000000001 1
26 62 0111100010 5
37 73 0011000110 4
